name: loan-app-annotations-no-broker-source
anchor: R11-B-1 Layer 2 inverse: annotations preserved when no broker source
rationale: loan_application doc has [Page N annotation] markers. Broker is SILENT on loan_amount (no broker_correction, no broker_initial_intent). R11-B-1 Layer 2 sanitization should NOT strip annotations because there's no broker source — Layer 2 trigger is broker-source presence. Tests Layer 2 inverse: annotations preserved when sanitization shouldn't apply.
notes: Single-event sequence. Distinct from A07 (annotations with broker correction); F11 tests the inverse — annotations without broker source.
